_comment: Regression anchor for the geometry-aware transform (Phase C).
Source: Slide 4 ('Personalization') from the exportable copy 1lrMk of
'Copy of [TEMPLATE] Contentful Personalization | Modular Field Deck | Q2FY27'
This slide is the canonical composite-value slide: title + 3 hero stats.
NON-NEGOTIABLES enforced by the eval harness (scripts/eval.py):
1. 87% is paired with Ace & Tate — never Ruggable or Kraft Heinz.
2. 78% is paired with Kraft Heinz — never Ace & Tate or Ruggable.
3. <30min is paired with Ruggable — never Ace & Tate or Kraft Heinz.
4. No stat atom has metric '[NEEDS REVIEW]' (geometry fusion must succeed).
5. All three stat atoms have a non-null attributedTo customer key.
'metric' and 'attributedTo' fields → validated after transform (smart mode)
'illustrates' edge on image atom   → validated after image-describer (enrich step)
atomKey naming reflects what transform.py generates:

sourceDocument.title: Copy of [TEMPLATE] Contentful Personalization | Modular Field Deck | Q2FY27

atoms._note: Parent value_prop for the slide. Contains the three proof atoms.
REQUIRED: 87% → Ace & Tate. This was WRONG in the old export (Pattern B bug).
atoms.semanticSummary: Ace & Tate achieved 87% higher click-through rate using Contentful Personalization.

atoms._note: REQUIRED: 78% → Kraft Heinz. This was WRONG in the old export (Pattern B bug).
atoms.metric: 78% Increase in conversion rate  by Kraft Heinz
atoms.body: 78% Increase in conversion rate by Kraft Heinz
atoms.semanticSummary: Kraft Heinz achieved a 78% increase in conversion rate using Contentful Personalization.

atoms._note: REQUIRED: <30min → Ruggable. This was WRONG in the old export (Pattern B bug).
atoms.semanticSummary: Ruggable was able to personalize experiences in under 30 minutes with Contentful.
